notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alec Bohm. Spencer Horwitz scores.

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alec Bohm. Spencer Horwitz scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds out, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd. Marcell Ozuna to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Bryce Harper out at 2nd. Alec Bohm out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin strikes out swinging. Spencer Horwitz to 3rd. Spencer Horwitz steals (1) 2nd base. Spencer Horwitz to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Garrett Stubbs.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alec Bohm. Spencer Horwitz scores.
